rationale: Real upstream CompositeEngine (github.com/HKUDS/Vibe-Trading) cross-market run over ['NVDA.US', 'AAPL.US', 'MSFT.US', 'TSLA.US', 'SPY.US', 'QQQ.US', 'JPM.US', 'XOM.US', 'JNJ.US', 'TLT.US', 'GLD.US', 'CASH.US', 'BTC-USDT'] using upstream's own vol-adjusted dual-moving-average example strategy (per-market MA windows, inverse-volatility position sizing). Final target weights read directly from upstream's own artifacts/positions.csv, clipped to long-only and renormalized to sum <= 1.0 for this schema's cash-neutral convention. A BTC-USDT anchor position was added because the requested tickers were single-market, so the real upstream CompositeEngine (not the single-market engine) is exercised.
